name: Erraticannon
description:
Activate (2 Actions)

Frequency once per day

Effect You set the erraticannon to maximum power and unleash a blast that deals 1d6 acid, 1d6 cold, 1d6 electricity, 1d6 fire, 1d6 sonic, 1d6 bludgeoning, 1d6 piercing, and 1d6 slashing damage to all creatures in a 30-foot cone (DC 25 Reflex check save).
